description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a long-sleeved, buttoned shirt that extends to mid-thigh, paired with straight-cut jeans and athletic sneakers. The figure's arms are extended horizontally to the sides, creating a T-pose, and the hands are open with fingers slightly spread. The facial features are defined, with short, neatly styled hair and a neutral expression. The shirt fits loosely, while the jeans are more fitted, and the sneakers have visible laces and a low profile. The overall build is average, with proportional limbs and a natural stance. The clothing and footwear suggest a casual, everyday urban style suitable for walking or standing in public spaces.
description: An adult male in a long-sleeved shirt, jeans, and sneakers, standing in a T-pose with arms outstretched. The figure has short hair and a casual, urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, buttoned shirt, jeans, and sneakers with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the shirt's length, and the side of the sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, jeans, and both arms fully extended.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and side details of the clothing and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved buttoned shirt and straight-cut jeans with athletic sneakers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
